summary: Metric CSV file is used for importing and exporting OpenMetadata metrics.

headers.name: name
headers.description: Name that identifies the metric.

headers.name: displayName
headers.description: Display name of the metric.

headers.name: description
headers.description: Metric description in Markdown format.
examples: Net sales after discounts and returns.

headers.name: metricType
headers.description: Metric aggregation or business type.

headers.name: unitOfMeasurement
headers.description: Metric unit of measurement.

headers.name: customUnitOfMeasurement
headers.description: Custom unit when unitOfMeasurement is OTHER.

headers.name: granularity
headers.description: Metric time granularity.

headers.name: expressionLanguage
headers.description: Language used by the canonical metric expression.

headers.name: expressionCode
headers.description: Canonical expression used to compute the metric.

headers.name: sourceType
headers.description: Source system where the metric definition originated.

headers.name: sourceEntityLink
headers.description: OpenMetadata entity link to the source metric definition.

headers.name: sourceId
headers.description: Stable source-system identifier for the metric definition.

headers.name: sourceName
headers.description: Source-system name for the metric definition.

headers.name: sourceUrl
headers.description: URL to the metric definition in the source system.

headers.name: sourceHash
headers.description: Hash of the source expression used to detect source drift.

headers.name: syncEnabled
headers.description: Whether source-to-OpenMetadata sync is enabled.

headers.name: syncStatus
headers.description: Current source sync status.

headers.name: relatedMetrics
headers.description: Related metric fully qualified names separated by ';'.

headers.name: tags
headers.description: Classification tag FQNs separated by ';'.

headers.name: glossaryTerms
headers.description: Glossary term FQNs separated by ';'.

headers.name: owners
headers.description: Owners in entityType:entityName format separated by ';'.

headers.name: reviewers
headers.description: Reviewers in entityType:entityName format separated by ';'.

headers.name: domains
headers.description: Domain FQNs separated by ';'.

headers.name: dataProducts
headers.description: Data product FQNs separated by ';'.

headers.name: entityStatus
headers.description: Metric approval status.

headers.name: extension
headers.description: Custom property values in key:value format separated by ';'.
